item.title: Artificial general intelligence and the future of surgery
item.description: It is no secret that the hyperscalers (e.g., Google Cloud, Amazon AWS, etc.) and the frontier AI labs (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepMind) are devoting extraordinary attention, time, and capital to the AI buildout. The big four (Amazon, Google, Microsoft, Meta… [Amazon, Microsoft, Meta, Intel, OpenAI, Anthropic, Alphabet]

item.title: How Oracle’s huge AI build-out is causing a cash crunch and layoffs

item.title: Earnings Season Kicks Off With War, AI Threat Among Key Worries

item.title: Uncovering Webloc: An Analysis of Penlink’s Ad-based Geolocation Surveillance Tech - The Citizen Lab
item.description:
Key Findings
Webloc is a global geolocation surveillance system that monitors hundreds of millions of people based on data purchased from consumer apps and digital advertising. It was developed by Cobwebs Technologies and is now sold by its successor Penlin… [ServiceNow]

item.title: Buy or Sell AMD Stock in 2026? Strong Buy Consensus as AI Momentum Builds Despite Nvidia Rivalry
